episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: 'Great set' can mean a great comedy performance or a great pair of breasts.
A Muslim father can't watch Kevin Bacon movies because the name contains 'bacon'.
Wrist slits double as a tally to count months being single.
When told he needs blonde hair and big boobs to finish, offering to dye his hair shifts the inadequacy onto him.
